text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I happen to pass by the arcade one<n>day, when...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I spot someone I don't expect<n>absorbed in a
dancing game. Her<n>expression is one of total
focus as<n>she moves... but her rhythm is<n>
abysmal.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Huff... I can't do it...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm so taken aback that I fail to look<n>away in
time. We make eye contact...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...Before you say anything, let me<n>speak.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I pride myself on being able to do<n>most tasks
better than the average<n>person. However...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
There's one thing I find myself inept<n>at—physical
activity.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I finish last in marathons, I've never<n>caught a
ball in my life, and I even had<n>to take the vaulting
box test multiple<n>times in gym class.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Straight As in every other subject, but<n>my PE
grades were dismal... Even<n>now, I become
exhausted after a day<n>out.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
As a trainer though, it's vital that my<n>physical
health be at a respectable<n>level.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
The other day, I was asked to do<n>some dance
coaching.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
But I can't dance, and my schedule<n>makes it
impossible for me to take<n>any classes to
prepare...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With a dignified poise, she gestures<n>to the screen
currently displaying a<n>grand combo score of zero.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
So I've been using this machine in<n>my spare
time to practice.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Unfortunately, it's much more difficultthan I expected. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should buy some more<n>reference
books. Oh, but my<n>bookshelves are already<n>
overflowing...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I'm just not built for<n>dancing. There
must be another way<n>to get better...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's a real shock to see someone as<n>capable as
her struggling this much.<n>There must be some
advice I can give<n>to help...
choice_data_list: How about building up your stamina first?
Persistence is key! Just keep at it!
Sorry, I'm in a bit of a rush today, so...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Stamina is essential in<n>performing
for long periods of time. I<n>overlooked that.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Time to relocate to a more appropriate<n>space to
train.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Curious about what she plans on<n>doing, I tag
along to her next<n>destination.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I'll start with ten laps—no, better to<n>begin with
five!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She continues jogging at a snail's<n>pace until
night falls.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Wheeze... I-I can't...
choice_data_list: Don't give up! You're almost there!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you for the encouragement. It<n>helped me
push myself further.
choice_data_list: Sorry, it just kind of slipped out.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I know it's not a grand gesture by<n>any means,
but please let me treat<n>you to some ramen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We head over to a ramen restaurant<n>and take a
seat.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I hadn't run in years. It felt quite nice.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I think I have a slightly better<n>understanding of
what our racers see<n>every day.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We end up talking about all sorts of<n>things over
dinner.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking of training here, but the<n>weather
looks like it may take a turn<n>for the worse.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It won't do us any good to catch a<n>cold... Let's
call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. I can't hope to gain<n>anything
without investing the effort.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
This is no time for self-pity! I need to<n>focus on
improving and nothing else!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Cha-cha-cha, cha, cha! ♪

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Interesting... If I liftmy right foot when I jump, then...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Cha-cha-cha, cha, cha! ♪

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
So that's what I need to do. Right,<n>right, left,
spin... Okay.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her hard work pays off, and she<n>appears to
slowly get the hang of it. A<n>few hours later...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Cha-cha-cha, cha, chaaa! ♪

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank you... And, er, sorry for<n>making a
scene... Ahem!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I made quite a lot of progress, if I say<n>so myself.
I'm glad I kept at it.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate all your encouraging<n>words. Allow
me to buy you a drink as<n>thanks.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We go to a local bar where she treats<n>me to a
drink. Then, on our way out...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
While we may be trainers, I'm of the<n>belief that
we should be able to dance<n>to our racers' debut
songs at the very<n>least.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps we could incorporate dance<n>lessons into
the trainer workshops.<n>Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I didn't realize—apologies for<n>interrupting you.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I'll see you at the academy, then.
